creator: info@aballesta.es
text:
Aplying the patch on /usr/ports/editors/lazarus/, I'm in the same situation:

============
(...)
Compiling lazarus.pp
Compiling lazconf.pp
Compiling ideguicmdline.pas
Compiling lazarusidestrconsts.pas
Writing Resource String Table file: lazarusidestrconsts.rst
Compiling idecmdline.pas
Compiling splash.pp
Compiling main.pp
main.pp(75,3) Fatal: Can't find unit AllSynEdit used by Main
Fatal: Compilation aborted
gmake[2]: *** [lazarus] Error 1
gmake[2]: se sale del directorio `/usr/ports/editors/lazarus/work/lazarus/ide'
gmake[1]: *** [ide] Error 2
gmake[1]: se sale del directorio `/usr/ports/editors/lazarus/work/lazarus/ide'
gmake: *** [ide] Error 2
*** [do-build] Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/lazarus.
*** [build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/lazarus.
==============


Sorry...
